translation.en: I always ask you for help.

sentenceBreakdowns: Anh (he) + luôn (always) + uống (drink) + một (a) + ly (cup) + trà (tea)
Em (I) + luôn (always) + học (study) + một (a) + bài (lesson) + mới (new)

translation.en: I always ask you for help.

notes_md:
**Luôn** means *always* — something happens all the time, not just sometimes. It shows strong consistency.

It’s an adverb and usually comes **before the main verb**.  

You can also use it to emphasize a personal trait or habit (luôn đúng giờ, luôn bận).

Close synonym: **lúc nào cũng** (a bit more conversational).  
Opposite: **không bao giờ** (never).
exampleSentencesTranslated: He always drinks a cup of tea.
I always study a new lesson.
exampleSentences: Anh luôn uống một ly trà.
Em luôn học một bài mới.

example.vi: Tôi luôn cố gắng học tốt.
example.en: I always try to study well.

notes:
Luôn means always — something happens all the time, not just sometimes. It shows strong consistency.

It’s an adverb and usually comes before the main verb.  

You can also use it to emphasize a personal trait or habit (luôn đúng giờ, luôn bận).

Close synonym: lúc nào cũng (a bit more conversational).  
Opposite: không bao giờ (never).
